subcodes.first_line: In this day the leaves of the trees in the gardens of inner meanings and utterance, each in wondrous melodies, make mention of the handmaidens of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز اوراق اشجار حدائق معانی و بیان هر یک بالحان بدیعه اماء الله را ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @goodly deeds; actions, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
